official_sources.evidence: HitBTC v3 API family includes spot, margin, futures, wallet and trading WebSocket surfaces.

runtime_isolation: Current HitBTC runtime is spot public REST plus offline private specs; futures/margin must use explicit product scope guards and separate risk/position parsers.
unsupported_runtime_reason: HitBTC margin/futures surfaces are official, but the current runtime only promotes Spot lifecycle/readbacks; derivatives metadata, positions/risk and order reconciliation are not wired.
required_auth_and_scope: read-only and trade permission validation for margin/futures
private WS or REST reconciliation policy for derivatives state
unsafe_to_promote_without: margin/futures metadata separated from spot symbols
remaining_work: separate HitBTC futures and margin market metadata from spot symbols
add margin/futures balances, positions and risk readbacks
promote private auth/order runtime only after dry-run and reconciliation validation
